title: Fix T-Echo gateway link undefined symbols after SLIP Kconfig fix
description: After fixing project-LICHEN-gjhl, west build -p always -b t_echo/nrf52840 lichen/apps/gateway -d build_gateway_gjhl_techo_check passes Kconfig and compilation reaches link, then fails in zephyr_pre0.elf with undefined reference to build_link_nonce from lichen/subsys/lichen/link/lichen_link_rx.c:98 and undefined reference to z_impl_hwinfo_get_device_id from firmware/bridge-zephyr/subsys/lichen/lichen_l2.c via generated zephyr/syscalls/hwinfo.h:36. Investigate the missing link nonce helper export/source inclusion and the hwinfo driver/Kconfig dependency for this gateway build.
close_reason: Fixed T-Echo gateway link undefined symbols by including link_nonce.h in RX and selecting HWINFO for LICHEN_LORA_L2; verified west build passes.
